Trusted by 10,000+ companies worldwide

Centralized, straightforward work management software for teams

Centralize projects, tasks, and discussions for efficient end-to-end project management. From high-level capacity planning to individual tasks and checklists.

Create a knowledge base that's easy to navigate. Document processes and strategies to inform and align teams, stakeholders and your wider organization.

Achieve team goals efficiently. Add team members and external collaborators to projects, assign responsibilities, and track progress with confidence.

Project management

Centralize projects, tasks, and discussions for efficient end-to-end project management. From high-level capacity planning to individual tasks and checklists.

Documentation

Create a knowledge base that's easy to navigate. Document processes and strategies to inform and align teams, stakeholders and your wider organization.

Teamwork

Achieve team goals efficiently. Add team members and external collaborators to projects, assign responsibilities, and track progress with confidence.

Start every day in control

Your Home screen brings together your upcoming tasks, latest notifications and personal to-dos — all in one place. So it’s easy to stay focused on the work that matters.

A tool that’s easy to onboard, adopt and love

Simplify task management

Use Kanban boards for a centralized visual overview of all your team’s tasks. Move Tasks along the board as work progresses for transparent, efficient workflows.

Start from Templates

Kick-off projects with purpose-built templates that will help your team adopt best practices and get work moving faster.

Ask MeisterAI

Ask our built-in AI features to find pages within your Notes knowledge base, or ask for help writing anything from a blog post to an email.

Import Tasks

Quickly turn emails or meeting notes into Tasks and sync calendars with attributed deadlines. Our integrations make it easier than ever to transition from email.

Get support

Work through challenges or product questions, in native German and fluent English, with our dedicated customer support team.

Track progress

Get a complete overview of your team’s progress on projects and tasks in a simple report, giving you and your team a clear metric for ROI.

Enterprise-grade security

As your trusted digitalization partner, we're committed to providing a secure and reliable platform so you can manage your daily work with confidence.

  • ISO 27001 certified

  • Fully GDPR compliant

  • Hosted in Germany

  • Admin controls

  • Security best practices

"There’s no question about it – we are saving a lot of time. To get all of that off-the-shelf support for a project and have a ready-to-use structure is extremely valuable.
